title: Shou-chan Sora wo Tobu
synonyms: Sho is Flying in the Sky
synopsis: An anime version of Ikkei Makina's horror novel of the same name. It aired at the same time as the live-action adaptation. (Source: aniDB)

title: MASHIN CREATOR WATARU
synonyms: วาตารุ ผู้สร้างเทพจักรกล
synopsis: A new entry in the Mashin Eiyuuden Wataru series, in which the main character, fourth grader Wataru Hoshibe, appears as a RyuTuber aiming to become a superstar, and battles with his partner Ryuujinmaru in an alternate world of floating blocks to defeat the last boss “Enjoda”. (Source: Oricon, translated)

title: Tohai - Ura Rate Mahjong Tohai Roku
titleRomaji: Touhai: Ura Rate Mahjong Touhai Roku
titleEnglish: Tohai - Ura Rate Mahjong Tohai Roku
titleNative: 凍牌～裏レート麻雀闘牌録～
synopsis: Money, women, organs. Kei, a high school boy, frequents the underground mahjong parlor teeming with desires, earning him the moniker 'K of Ice' in the underworld due to his cold-hearted strategy and stylish gameplay. Rumors also circulate that he keeps a girl at his home. (Source: Pony Canyon)

title: blink
synopsis: That moment of refreshing sensation when drinking a soda in the hot summer. 1st year work 2021, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: POP JUNKIE
synopsis: TV shows, manga, music, movies, plays, pop stars and cartoon characters. I watch videos on my phone with the TV blaring and music in the background. I’m swimming in media… Is this the other side of the screen?! Awesome! 1st year work 2021, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: ELEMON
synopsis: Leo is a boy genius inventor. Aquro is a water type Elemon (H2O) created by Leo. Elemon are creatures born from the Elemon Blender. They are mysterious beings with the power of the elements! “ELEMON” opens up an exciting world of science and adventure, anchored by the friendship of Leo and Aquro as they explore an entire universe of unique Elemon! (Source: Toei Animation)

title: Shimajirou to Kirakira Oukoku no Ouji-sama
titleRomaji: Shimajirou to Kirakira Oukoku no Ouji-sama
titleNative: しまじろうとキラキラおうこくのおうじさま
synonyms: Shimajirou and the Prince of the Glitter Kingdom
synopsis: The story centers on Pearl, the prince of the Glitter Kingdom, who is preparing to become king. After he leaves the kingdom to go to Challenge Island, a situation causes the kingdom to lose its precious glitter. Shimajirou and friends set out with Pearl, who lacks self-confidence, on an adventure to find three keys to save the kingdom. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Chou Futsuu-ken Chiba Densetsu
synonyms: The Legend of Super normal Pref. CHIBA
synopsis: In the seemingly ordinary Prefecture Chiba, where life moves at its own relaxed pace, meet Shikawa Ako—a high school student with an unremarkable existence. Little does she know, the humdrum days of Chiba are about to get a hilarious twist. In 'The Legend of Super Normal Prefecture Chiba,' Ako inadvertently becomes the epicenter of a comedic storm that turns the 'ordinary' into the spectacularly absurd.

title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Baikinman to Ehon no Lulun
titleRomaji: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Baikinman to Ehon no Lulun
titleNative: それいけ！アンパンマン　ばいきんまんとえほんのルルン
synopsis: The film's story centers on Anpanman's nemesis Baikinman, but this time, he attempts to become a warrior of love and courage when he is sucked into a picture book. Inside the book is a large forest where fairies live. Baikinman meets the fairy Lulun, who asks him to defeat an elephant that is rampaging in the forest. Although Baikinman is reluctant, he tries his best to defeat the elephant. However, it is too strong for Baikinman, so he tells Lulun to call Anpanman to help protect the picture book world. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Kids

title: Mahjong Soul KAN!!
synopsis: Sequel to Jongtama PONG☆ . Following up the prior animated series, this time you will see quirky Jyanshis trying out live streaming, two guys traveling together, unfortunate(?) fights against gangs, and more situations where the charm of the Jyanshis comes to shine. (Source: Mahjong Soul News, edited)

title: Guardy Girls
synopsis: Three amazing girls–the far-too-strong Silvia, the gun-totin', bullet-blastin' Laurie, and the scientific magical girl Fumi–have formed the Guardy Girls, a brand new team of heroes! They're faced with a rogues gallery of wacky, off-kilter villains–and fellow do-gooders, too! It's a grand way to kick off the Girls' daunting, amazing dream of a hero run!

title: Totonoe! Sakuma-kun by &sauna
titleNative: ととのえ！サクマくん by &sauna
synopsis: An anime short featuring the mascot for Hokkaido Cultural Broadcasting. Talking bear Sakuma-kun and his family visit various hot springs in Japan.

title: Amane Diary
synopsis: This work is based on 15 years of entries in the diary that I’ve kept since age eight. Through creating this work I was searching for freedom from my preconceptions about animation and myself. 1st year work 2021, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Coping Mechanism
synopsis: No doubt negative energy is going to accumulate in my body today, tomorrow and the day after. When that happens, I’ll have my own way of release. 1st year work 2021, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Shinkalion: Change the World
titleNative: シンカリオン チェンジ ザ ワールド
synonyms: 新幹線変形ロボ シンカリオン チェンジ ザ ワールド
Shinkansen Henkei Robo Shinkalion: Change the World
synopsis: "Unknown" is a mysterious enemy that suddenly appeared a long time ago. As a countermeasure, the "Evolutionary Railway Development Agency" (ERDA) has developed the "Shinkalion" robot that transform into bullet trains, to prepare for the threat. "I want to be a cool person who can protect something..." Taisei Oonari, a second-year junior high school student, transfers to Shinkai Gakuen Middle School in search of clues about his older sister who disappeared two years ago. Just then, the Unknown appears for the first time in 10 years. Taisei happens to have a high aptitude value as a Shinkalion pilot, and is forced to make a decision to fight it. What is the true nature of the Unknown and what is its purpose? What is the truth that comes to light at the end of the fight? The story of the boys' determination and growth begins now. (Source: Official Website, translated) Note: Relations are provisional and will be updated when more info is announced.
